user_prompt: The cover letter you drafted is too generic. Add a sentence about their open-source contributions.
actual_output:
Absolutely — add a company-specific open-source line in the motivation paragraph.

Suggested sentence:

> I’m also excited by your team’s open-source contributions, especially the way you share production-grade tools with the broader developer community rather than keeping that knowledge internal.

If you want it to be stronger, use this version with a placeholder for the specific project:

> Your open-source work on **[Project/Repo Name]** stood out to me because it reflects the kind of engineering culture I value: building reliable internal systems and contributing them back to the wider developer ecosystem.

Best placement: after the sentence explaining why you’re interested in the company, before the paragraph about your experience.

If you send me the company name or repo, I’ll make it more specific and less templated.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot directly addressed the user's request by providing two specific options for the cover letter and offering to further customize them if provided with more details.
